nasb.text: It was square; they made the breastpiece folded double, a span long and a span wide when folded double.

esv.text: It was square. They made the breastpiece doubled, a span its length and a span its breadth when doubled.

cnv.text: 胸牌是正方形的；他們把胸牌做成雙層，長二十二公分，寬二十二公分，是雙層的。

ccb.text: 胸牌呈正方形，叠成两层，长宽各二十二厘米。
